profile.sidebar_tooltip: Edit nickname, message, and profile picture
profile.avatar_hint: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF. The file is stored in your OrionBE cache folder.
profile.tagline_watermark: Short line under your nickname (max 120 characters)

addons.placeholder: Add-ons will appear here in a future update.

general.launcher_keep_the_launcher: Keep the launcher open when the game is running

add_instance.title: Add instance
add_instance.mode_hint: Vanilla is default. Enable mods to unlock the mod install pipeline for this instance.
add_instance.levi_hint: This game version is compatible with LeviLamina. You can create the instance with or without the loader.
add_instance.levi_support_yes: LeviLamina support available for this game version.
add_instance.levi_support_no: LeviLamina not available for this game version.
add_instance.keep_open_on: Keep window open when installation succeeds (review logs)
add_instance.install_log_watermark: Installation steps appear here while creating an instance.

instance_settings.title: Instance settings
instance_settings.update_channel_button: Update to latest in this channel
instance_settings.linux_gdk_hint: Paths saved at install time (raonygamer/umu-launcher, raonygamer/gdk-proton).
instance_settings.levi_hint: Version installed in this instance (used to validate mod compatibility).
instance_settings.import_hint: Import a local .zip or .dll. Online mod browsing will be added later.
instance_settings.installed_mods_hint: Enable or disable; files remain on disk.
instance_settings.upgrade_hint_none: No newer build in this channel. Stable does not move to preview (and vice versa); downgrades are not offered.
instance_settings.upgrade_hint_error: Could not check the Bedrock catalog for updates.

mod_details.title: Mod details
mod_details.screenshots_hint: Optional images resolved from docs/prints when present next to the published build.

dialogs.dependency_check_intro: The launcher detected missing runtime dependencies during first startup.
dialogs.dependency_check_outro: Please install the missing dependencies and restart OrionBE Launcher.
dialogs.delete_instance_body:
The folder and all files for this instance will be deleted from disk.

“{0}”
This cannot be undone. Continue?
dialogs.enter_local_path: Enter a path to a local file.
dialogs.select_primary_dll_body: Multiple .dll files were found in this ZIP. Choose the main one used by this mod:
dialogs.instance_updated: The instance was updated to the latest game files allowed for this channel.
dialogs.version_mismatch_body: The instance is on {0}, but this mod targets {1}. Continue anyway?
dialogs.levi_required_body: This mod requires LeviLamina, but the instance does not have a LeviLamina version configured in Instance Settings.
dialogs.levi_mismatch_body: Instance LeviLamina={0}, required range={1}. Continue anyway?
dialogs.mod_installed_body: The mod was copied into the instance mods folder.
dialogs.no_modded_instances_body: There are no instances with mods enabled. Enable mods on an instance or create a new mod-enabled instance.
dialogs.umu_exit_body: The GDK launcher wrapper exited with code {0}. If nothing appeared, attach installation logs or Proton/Wine logs when reporting the issue. Verify system dependencies if installation logs showed no errors.
